title: Hand-off to incident-postmortem: produce structured block consumable by Gate 1
scenario: User finishes log analysis in Strict mode and asks for a post-mortem. The Hand-off Protocol section must be filled with structured fields that incident-postmortem Gate 1 (Incident Context Collection) consumes directly.
expected_finding: Skill must emit a Hand-off Protocol block with incident_id, impact_summary, window_utc, affected_services, data_sources, top_findings (referencing finding IDs), leading_hypothesis, blameless_framing — and use system-and-process language, not name individuals.
